title: Deterministic replay harness + frozen golden-replay oracle
acceptance_criteria: HistoricalFeed implements BrokerFeed: reads market_ticks/option_ticks for a window in time order and emits via the SAME pipeline that trades live (market.ticks -> StraddleCalculator -> straddle.values -> PositionMonitor -> paper_trades). Single code path — no separate synchronous fan-out.
Determinism is clock-driven: VirtualClock.tick() drives snapshot cadence in replay (NOT setInterval). Live mode keeps its existing setInterval + void takeSnapshot() untouched in behaviour.
StraddleCalculator exposes an awaitable snapshotStep() that resolves only AFTER the snapshot is written to straddle.values. The replay driver awaits it.

NAMED DRAIN BARRIER: PositionMonitor exposes an awaitable processedThrough(streamId) (or the replay path uses a Redis consumer group and asserts XPENDING==0). The driver awaits this barrier before clock.advance(). The barrier primitive is concrete and named, not 'drain'.
The replay code path contains ZERO floating promises (no bare `void`/un-awaited async) — assert/enforce this in review and tests.
Forbid '$' Redis cursors in the replay path: replay consumers are pinned to a fixed start id ('0'); HistoricalFeed publish/consume ordering is asserted so no leading ticks are dropped.
Live-path regression: existing straddle-calc.test.ts AND position-monitor.test.ts pass unchanged; add a SIMULATE snapshot-cadence assertion proving live behaviour is preserved.

GOLDEN ORACLE: a small FROZEN, CHECKED-IN historical fixture + checked-in expected trade ledger. A test asserts replay reproduces the ledger. Comparison is a canonicalized STRUCTURAL compare (decimals normalized to fixed precision via decimal.js, stable key ordering, typed field equality) — NOT byte-for-byte. The fixture is authored once from the synthetic generator and committed; CI replays the FROZEN fixture (never regenerates it per run).
The fixture includes >=1 calendar-gap-marked range and >=1 resolution tag so it is a valid M3b backtest input by construction.
100x-identical-ledger gate runs in this task's harness. (Worker-context equivalence inside a BullMQ worker is an M3b ENTRY criterion for T-51, not a blocker here.)
Adds `bun run replay` script (date range, speed, underlying args).
Named exports only; TS strict; passes tsc --noEmit and lint.
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
